headline: DoorDash AI And SNAP Expansion Deepen Grocery Presence And Investor Story
summary: DoorDash (NasdaqGS:DASH) has introduced new AI tools for merchants aimed at improving onboarding and day to day operations. The company is also expanding EBT/SNAP payment support to nearly 2,700 Kroger grocery stores across the U.S. These updates extend digital access and affordability for millions of SNAP recipients using online grocery delivery. DoorDash, best known for restaurant delivery, has been pushing further into grocery and convenience, where reliability, speed, and ease of use...

headline: 3 takeaways from Albertsons’ annual report
summary: The grocer has become more reliant on pharmacy to drive its overall sales, while e-commerce sales growth has slowed and private label has rebounded.
